lever: Skip accumulating the unused q_total Schur-vector matrix during the real Hessenberg QR eig sweep; keep all updates to the observed Hessenberg matrix t unchanged.

baseline.command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-post-p150-reprofile cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(eig_48x48_f64|eigh_48x48_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64|qr_1024x1024_f64|pinv_192x192_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|svd_48x48_f64|svd_48x48_full_f64|matmul_2d_1024x1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

candidate.proof_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf30-proof3 cargo test -p fj-lax --lib eig -- --nocapture
candidate.bench_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf30-final-bench cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/eig_48x48_f64' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot
candidate.guard_command: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 RCH_WORKER=ts1 RCH_ENV_ALLOWLIST=CARGO_TARGET_DIR rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch-frankenjax-p1vbf30-final-guards cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline -- 'linalg/(qr_1024x1024_f64|lu_1024x1024_f64|cholesky_1024x1024_f64)' --sample-size 10 --measurement-time 3 --warm-up-time 1 --noplot

isomorphism.ordering: The Hessenberg matrix t receives the same left and right Givens transformations in the same order; only the discarded q_total accumulator skips rotations.
isomorphism.tie_breaking: Deflation checks, block walking, eigenvalue extraction, and output column pairing are unchanged.
isomorphism.floating_point: All floating-point arithmetic that contributes to returned eigenvalues/eigenvectors is unchanged. Removed arithmetic mutates only q_total, which is not observed.

validation: RCH ts1 cargo test -p fj-lax --lib eig -- --nocapture passed
RCH ts1 target and guard Criterion benches passed
RCH ts1 cargo clippy -p fj-lax --all-targets -- -D warnings passed
RCH ts1 cargo check -p fj-lax --all-targets passed
rustfmt --edition 2024 --check crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs blocked by pre-existing formatting drift outside this lever
ubs crates/fj-lax/src/linalg.rs blocked by pre-existing inventory; UBS clippy/fmt/check sections were clean
next_candidate: Reprofile; sidecar recommends lu_factor_real_blocked fused in-place Schur update, target >=1.15x on linalg/lu_1024x1024_f64.
